English: Please select a camera. then use a camera display to zoom in as far as possible and move the centre point over a known stationary object.
Chinese: 请选择一个相机，然后使用相机显示屏尽可能放大并将中心点移动到已知静止物体上

English: Please move the offset point over the same object. then click Store FOV.  Repeat this process at a number of different zoom levels (including zoomed out as far as possible).
Chinese: 请将偏移点移动到同一对象上，然后单击“存储 FOV”。 在多个不同的缩放级别（包括尽可能缩小）重复此过程

English: Please use the controls to preview the new calibration against the old.  Click Save to save the new values are return to the application.  Click Cancel or close the dialog to discard the new values.
Chinese: 请使用控件预览新校准与旧校准。 单击保存以保存返回到应用程序的新值。 单击取消或关闭对话框以放弃新值。

English: Right click to add new condition
Chinese: 右击鼠标增加新的条件

English: No data [colour NODTA, AP(NODATA03)], unsurveyed (UNSARE), incompletely surveyed area
Bridge (BRIDGE), pylon (PYLONS), overhead cable (CBLOHD), conveyor (CONVYR), overhead pipeline (PIPOHD), offshore platform (OFSPLF)
Bridge, pylon, pipeline, overhead cable, conveyor, etc

Coastline (COALNE), ice shelf, glacier (ICEARE), shoreline construction (SLCONS), tie-up wall, dolphin (MORFAC), gate (GATCON, pile (PILPNT) crib, wellhead, ice boom (OBSTRN), floating dock (FLODOC), hulk (HULKES), pontoon (PONTON), oilboom (OILBAR), log boom (LOGPON), flood barrage (DAMCON, CATDAM3)
Coastline, ice shelf, glacier, shoreline construction, etc
Safety contour (from conditional symbology procedure DEPCNT02)
Isolated underwater dangers in own-ship safe water (rocks, wrecks, obstructions, mooring cables from conditional symbology procedure)
River (RIVERS), riverbank (RIVBNK), lake (LAKARE), lakeshore (LAKSHR), sloping ground (SLOGRD), slope top (SLOTOP), dyke (DYKCON), causeway (CAUSWY), dam (DAMCON)
River, riverbank, lake, lakeshore, sloping ground, etc
Radar conspicuous object - (any object with attribute CONRAD 1)
Visually conspicuous object (any object with attribute CONVIS 1)
Area of depth less than the safety contour (DIAMON01 pattern)
Depth less than the safety contour
Mooring cables (MORFAC, CATMOR6), (CBLSUB, CATCBL6), tunnel on seabed (TUNNEL, BURDEP=0), sandwaves (SNDWAV)
Mooring cables, tunnel on seabed, sandwaves
Isolated underwater dangers in waters between the displayed safety contour and the drying line (rocks, wrecks, obstructions, mooring cables from conditional symbology procedure UDWHAZnn)
Isolated above-water dangers in waters between the safety contour and the drying line (rocks, wrecks, obstructions which are always dry from conditional symbology procedure UDWHAZnn)
Radar line (RADLNE), limit of shore radar (RADRNG)
Radar line, limit of shore radar
Ferry route area (FERYRT), submarine transit lane (SUBTLN), military practice area (MIPARE), sea plane landing area (SPLARE), offshore production area (OSPARE)
Ferry route area, submarine transit lane, military practice area, etc
Buoys, beacons, topmarks, lights, fog signals
Buoys, beacons, topmarks, lights, fog signals
Buoy (BOYxxx), light float (LITFLT), mooring buoy (MORFAC, CATMOR7)
Direction of buoyage IALA buoyage regions (M_NSYS)
Signal station, traffic (SISTAT), signal station warning (SISTAW)
Signal station, traffic, signal station warning
Accuracy of data (MPCCY), survey reliability (M_SREL), survey source (M_SSOR) quality of data (M_QUAL)
Accuracy of data, survey reliability, survey source, etc
Symbol LOWACC01, identifying low accuracy data, applied to the spatial object of point and area wrecks, rocks and obstructions and to point land areas
Information from attributes INFORM, TXTDSC, PICREP
Dunes, hills (SLOGRD), ridge, clifftop (SLOTOP), contours and elevation (LNDELV)
Dunes, hills, ridge, clifftop, contours, elevation
River (RIVERS) or lake (LAKARE); also rapids (RAPIDS), waterfall (WATFAL)
Any of the following not classified as CONVIS1 (conspicuous): landmark (LNDMRK), building (BUISGL), tank, silo, water tower (SILTNK)cairn (CAIRNS), wall (FNCLNE), fort (FORSTC)
Landmark, building, tank, silo, water tower, cairn, wall, fort
Quarry, refinery, power station, tank farm, wind farm, factory, timber yard (PRDARE)
Quarry, refinery, power station, tank farm, wind farm, etc
Harbour type (HRBFAC), customs check point (CHKPNT) [note: 'small craft facilities' (SMCFAC) is in group 38210]
Berthing facility (such as wharf) (BRTFAC), berth number (BERTHS), mooring facility (such as bollard) (MORFAC), gate (such as lock gate) (GATCON) , dry dock (DRYDOC), crane (CRANES)
Berthing facility, berth number, mooring facility, etc
Depth contours (DEPCNT) other than the safety contour, line depth area (DEPARE)
Label for contours other than the safety contour
Current and tidal stream information (CURENT, TS_FEB, TS_PAD, TS_PNH, TS_PRH, TS_TIS)
Seabed information: rocks, wrecks & obstns, pipes & cables
Rocks (UWTROC), wrecks (WRECKS), obstructions (OBSTNS), which are not a danger to own-ship's navigation (these are all Display Base if a danger to own-ship)

Non-dangerous rocks (UWTROC), wrecks (WRECKS) and obstructions (OBSTRN) which have a VALSOU attribute and are not a danger to own-ship's navigation (these objects are all Display Base if a danger to own-ship)
Harbour area (HRBARE) free port area (FRPARE), customs zone (CUSZNE)
Harbour area, free port area, customs zone
Contiguous zone (CONZNE), exclusive economic zone (EXEZNE), national territorial area (NATARE), territorial sea (TESARE), territorial sea baseline (STSLNE), administration area (ADMARE)
Contiguous zone, exclusive economic zone, national territorial area, etc

Vertical clearance of bridges, overhead cable, pipe or conveyor (BRIDGE, CBLOHD, PIPOHD, CONVYR, VERCLR, VERCCL, VERCOP), bearing of navline, recommended route, deep water route centreline line (NAVLNE, RCRTCL, DWRTCL, ORIENT), name and communications channel of radio calling-in point (RDOCAL, OBJNAM, COMCHA)
Vertical clearance of bridges, overhead cable, pipe, etc
Names for position reporting: name or number (OBJNAM) of buoys (BOYxxx), beacons (BCNxxx), daymarks (DAYMAR), light vessel, light float (LITVES, LITFLT), offshore platform (OFSPLF)
Name or number of buoys, beacons, daymarks, light vessel, etc
Note on chart data (INFORM) or nautical publication (TXTDSC)
Note on chart data or nautical publication
Geographic names (OBJNAM of SEAARE, LNDRGN etc)
Value of: magnetic variation (VALMAG of MAGVAR); swept depth (DRVAL1 of SWPARE)
Height of islet or land feature
Height of islet or land feature
Right click to add new filter
Chinese: 右击鼠标增加新的条件
错误: 选择无效接口

English: Enter the licence key for the radar.
Optionally enter the serial number of the radar to connect to, otherwise the first radar detected will be used.
Closing the main window will close the whole RadarWatch application  please confirm.
Chinese: 关闭主窗口将会关闭所有应用，请确认。
保存报警区域和过滤区域

English: Right click to add new condition
Right click to add new alarm
Right click to add new filter

Chinese: 覆盖分配给插槽的布局

English: Enter a location latitude and longitude

Chinese: 清除所有已知晓的报警
删除所有已清除的报警

English: Supported latitude and longitude entry formats:
Use as point for camera correction.
Right click to add new ruler
or press and hold to update
RadarWatch must be restarted using the saved configuration file for the changes to take effect.
Chinese: 必须重启RadarWatch以确保修改和保存的配置文件生效。

English: Do you wish to restart RadarWatch now?
Failed to save shared area config!
Failed to save shared alarm config!
Chinese: 保存共享报警配置失败！

English: Failed to save shared track filters!
Chinese: 保存共享航迹过滤失败！

English: Do you wish to restart RadarWatch now?

Chinese: 将修改保存到配置文件？
由融合航迹触发的报警:
由雷达航迹触发的报警:

English: Default video window for user action:
Chinese: 默认用户操作视频窗口:

English: Default video window for alarm action:
Chinese: 默认报警操作视频窗口:

English: Show window when viewing in it:
Certain features of shared mode are not expected to work properly without the SPX_SHARED environment variable.
Chinese: 某些共享模式的功能在未设置SPX_SHARED环境变量时，将不会生效。

English: Continue (shared mode can be disabled through the Application Wizard)
Chinese: 继续(共享模式可以通过应用向导禁用)

English: Close RadarWatch and set the environment variable
Enter track name/ID/callsign to search for
Chinese: 输入航迹的名称/ID/呼号 进行搜索

English: Set as horizon location for camera correction.
Chinese: 设置为摄像头校准地平线位置。

English: Set as position of the correction point in the camera view.
Chinese: 在摄像视频中设置为校准点位置。

English: Select auto or manual camera control
Chinese: 选择摄像头手动或自动控制

English: Please select whether Access Control should be enabled.
Chinese: 请选择是否启用登录控制。

English: If Access Control is enabled, please specify which features should be controlled.
Chinese: 如果启用登录控制，请指定哪些功能被控制。

English: Please specify the filename of up to 10 audio files to be used for playing custom alarm sounds.
Chinese: 请指定最多10个声音文件用于播放自定义报警音。

English: Please select the units to use for displaying distance.
Please select the units to use for displaying speed.
Please select the format for displaying latitude and longitude.
Chinese: 请选择经纬度的显示格式.

English: ddd° mm.mmmm' N, ddd° mm.mmmm' E
Chinese: ddd° mm.mmmm' N, ddd° mm.mmmm' E

English: ddd° mm' ss.ss'' N, ddd° mm' ss.ss'' E
Chinese: ddd° mm' ss.ss'' N, ddd° mm' ss.ss'' E

English: If you have an LRAD unit, please specify the filename of up to 10 audio files that can be automatically broadcast when alarms are triggered.
Chinese: 如果您有 LRAD 装置，请指定最多 10 个可在触发警报时自动广播的音频文件的文件名

English: Please select which of the following PPI map options are required.
If ENC support is enabled, please specify the directory where chart data is installed.
Chinese: 如果支持ENC,请指定ENC地图安装的文件目录。

English: For the Radar Coverage Map, please specify the format of the terrain data to be received.
Chinese: 对于雷达覆盖图，请选择地形数据格式。

English: Please also specify the URL or the file path for the source of the terrain data.
Chinese: 请为地形图指定URL或文件路径。

English: If remote control of RadarWatch is required, please enable it here and set the network port to use.
Chinese: 如需远程控制RadarWatch，请在此启用并设置网络端口。

English: RadarWatch supports a beta web interface for development and testing.  If required, please enable it here and set the network port to use.
Chinese: RadarWatch支持web接口用于开发和测试，如需要，请在此启用并设置网络端口。

English: If control of a remote RDR is required, please it enable it here and configure network settings and the features RadarWatch will control.
Chinese: 如果需要启用远程控制RDR，请在此启用并配置网络参数。

English: If recording/replaying of camera position is required please enable it here and configure network settings.
Chinese: 如果需要启用摄像头位置的记录/回放，请在此激活并配置网络参数。
摄像头位置记录/回放启用

English: Please set the network address and port to report camera positions on (for RDR to record).
Chinese: 请为摄像头位置报告设置网络地址和端口（用于RDR记录）

English: Please set the network address and port to receive camera positions on (that RDR will replay).
Chinese: 请为摄像头位置接收设置网络地址和端口（用于RDR回放）

English: Please select which of the following network inputs are required for this reference point and, where applicable, specify the data format.
Chinese: 请为该参考点选择需要的网络输入，并指定合适的格式。

English: Please select the format for GPS/compass data.
Chinese: 请为GPS/罗盘数据选择格式

English: Please specify the name to use for this reference point.
Please select the number of reference points (1 to 5).
Please select whether or not RadarWatch should be started in shared mode (requires the SPX_SHARED environment variable to be set to work properly).
Chinese: 请选择RadarWatch是否以共享模式启动 (需要SPX_SHARED环境变量正确设置生效).

English: Please enter a user ID to help distinguish this instance of RadarWatch from others.  The ID should be different to those used by other instances.
Chinese: 请输入用户ID以区分该RadarWatch与其他RadarWatch实体，该ID需要与其他实体的ID不同。

English: Please enter a user name to be used to help identify this instance of RadarWatch to other users.
Chinese: 请为该RadarWatch实体输入一个用户名以区别其他RadarWatch用户。

English: Please select which of the following network track inputs are required and, where applicable, specify the data format. Configuration of radar track inputs is configured on per-radar basis later in the wizard.
Chinese: 请选择需要的下列网络航迹输入，并指定合适的数据格式，雷达航迹输入配置在本向导中的后段设置。

English: Please select the format for AIS tracks.
Please select the format for ADS-B tracks.
Please select the format for combined (fused) tracks.
Chinese: 请为融合的航迹选择格式。

English: If AIS support is enabled, RadarWatch can download and display images from www.marinetraffic.com. A key must be purchased to enable this service and can be entered below.
Chinese: 如果AIS支持启用，RadarWatch可以从www.marinetraffic.com下载和显示图片，但需要额外购买服务许可才能在下面使用

English: If either of the 112-bit formats have been selected, please specify the format of 112-bit data to be received.
Chinese: 如果选择了112位格式，请指定要接收的112位数据的格式

English: Please configure any track groups that will be used in alarm and track filter conditions.  Each track group is assigned a display name and a filename.  The filename defines a text file that will be read at start-up to populate the group.  Please refer to the RadarWatch user manual for details of how to specify tracks in the file.
Chinese: 请为报警和航迹过滤器应用配置任意的航迹组。每个航迹组会分配一个显示名称和文件名。该文件名定义了一个文本文件，在软件启动时读取该文件名以布置到组。请参考RadarWatch用户手册。

English: This wizard will help you to perform initial configuration of RadarWatch.
Chinese: 该向导会帮助你完成RadarWatch的初步设置。

English: If the camera can be controlled by RadarWatch, please provide details here.
Chinese: 如果摄像头可以由RadarWatch控制，请在此留下详细内容。

English: If this is a primary camera and the field-of-view can be controlled, please specify the name of a file that will be used to translate zoom position to a field-of-view in degrees.
Chinese: 如果是主摄像头并且视角可以被控制，请指定一个文件名，该文件用于将以米表示的距离转换到视角中的角度。

English: If this camera has a colocated secondary camera, please specify the name of a file that will be used by the secondary camera to translate zoom position to a field-of-view in degrees.
Chinese: 如果该摄像头有一个副摄像头并且视角可以被控制，请指定一个文件名，该文件被副摄像头用于将以米表示的距离转换到视角中的角度。

English: If this camera has a second controller, please select the control type here.
Chinese: 如果该摄像头有第二个控制器，请选择控制类型。

English: Please specify below if this camera has a tour configured, and if so provide the name of the file containing the tour definition (tours are only available for primary cameras).
Chinese: 请在下面指定此摄像机是否配置了巡航功能，如果是，请提供包含巡航定义的文件的名称（巡航仅适用于主摄像机）

English: Please select which of the following network inputs are required and, where applicable, specify the data format.
Chinese: 请选择下列需要的网络输入，并设定合适的数据格式。

English: Please select the format for GPS/compass data.
Please select the format for video data.
Chinese: 请为视频数据选择格式.

English: If this camera is colocated with another camera, please specify the zero referenced index of the secondary colocated camera. Set to -1 if not colocated.
Chinese: 如果该摄像头与另一个摄像头联合工作，请为副摄像头指定0参考索引；如果不是，请设置为-1

English: Please select what LRAD functionality is present.
Chinese: 请选择需要呈现的LRAD功能.

English: Please specify the name to use for this camera.
Please select the number of cameras (0 to 16).
Chinese: 请选择摄像头数量 (0 to 16).

English: The camera may optionally be located at a reference point so that the position of the camera moves and rotates with the reference point. If required, please specify the zero referenced index of the point to use. Set to -1 to disable.
Chinese: 该摄像头可以选择性的定位在一个参考点，这样摄像头可以和参考点一同移动和旋转，如果需要，请指定0参考索引；设置为-1表示不启用。

English: If required, please specify the offset from the reference position.
Chinese: 如需要，请指定与参考点之间的偏置。

English: If the camera can be controlled, please configure any presets supported by this camera.
Chinese: 如果能控制摄像头，请为该摄像头设置其支持的任意预置位
预置位 1 名称和数值:
预置位 2 名称和数值:
预置位 3 名称和数值:
预置位 4 名称和数值:
预置位 5 名称和数值:

English: Please configure any additional presets supported by this camera.
Chinese: 若摄像头支持，可以为该摄像头继续设置额外的预置位。
预置位 6 名称和数值:
预置位 7 名称和数值:
预置位 8 名称和数值:
预置位 9 名称和数值:
预置位 10 名称和数值:

English: This wizard will help you to perform initial configuration of cameras in RadarWatch.
Chinese: 该向导会帮助你完成摄像头的初始配置。

English: You have reached the end of the Wizard. If you have made any changes you will be prompted to save the changes to the configuration file. The changes will not take effect until the application is restarted.
Chinese: 你已经到向导的终点，如果你做了任何修改，建议您保存修改到配置文件。修改会在应用重新启动后生效。

English: If this radar will be controlled from RadarWatch, please specify the radar type and connection settings.
Chinese: 如果该雷达要从RadarWatch控制，请指定雷达型号和连接设置。

English: Please select the radar type for control..请选择要控制的雷达型号。
For Kelvin Hughes Sharpeye only, please specify the connection settings.
Chinese: 如果仅是KelvinHughes SharpEye, 请指定连接设置。

English: Please select which of the following network inputs are required for this radar and, where applicable, specify the data format.
Chinese: 请为本雷达选择下列需要的网络输入，并指定格式。

English: Please select the format for GPS/compass data.
Please select the format for radar video.
Please select the format for tracks.
Please specify if SPx Server, used to perform tracking for this radar, can be controlled by RadarWatch.
Chinese: 请选择RadarWatch是否控制SPxServer为该雷达提供目标航迹跟踪功能。

English: Please specify the name to use for this radar.
Please select the number of radars (0 to 4).

The radar may optionally be located at a reference point so that the position of the radar moves and rotates with the reference point. If required, please specify the zero referenced index of the point to use. Set to -1 to disable.
Chinese: 该雷达可以选择定位在一个参考点，这样摄像头可以和参考点一同移动和旋转，如果需要，请指定0参考索引；设置为-1表示不启用。

English: If required, please specify the offset from the reference position.
Chinese: 如需要，请指定参考点的偏移量。

English: Please specify whether this radar is mounted on a floating platform.
Chinese: 请确认该雷达是否安装在浮动平台上。

English: Please select the resolution for this radar.
Chinese: 请为该雷达选择分辨率。

English: If the instance of SPx Server for this radar will be controlled from RadarWatch you may specify a display name and file path for up to 5 SPx Server configuration files which can then be loaded via RadarWatch.  Please note that any relative path specified will be considered relative to the instance of SPx Server, not RadarWatch.
Chinese: 如果该SPx Server由RadarWatch控制，你可以为最多5个SPx Server配置文件指定一个配置名称和文件路径。请注意任意指定的路径都是与SPx Server相关的，而不是RadarWatch

English: This wizard will help you to perform initial configuration of radars in RadarWatch.
Chinese: 该向导会帮助你完成初步的雷达配置。

English: Please answer the questions on the following pages. You may move forward and backwards through the wizard as required, or finish at any point.
Chinese: 请回答下面的问题，你可以略过或返回，或者在任何点选择完成。
窗口大小，以采样点数为单位
窗口平均值以上的门限水平

English: Add this multiple of local standard deviation
Chinese: 加上此倍数的局部标准差

English: Sample value to set when above threshold
Chinese: 当超过门限时设置的采样值

English: End of attenuation range defined in metres
Chinese: 以米为单位定义的衰减距离结束

English: End of attenuation range defined in samples
Chinese: 以采样点为单位定义的衰减距离结束

English: Hold initial gain for this range in metres
Chinese: 在此距离（米）内保持初始增益

English: Hold initial gain for this range in samples
Chinese: 在此距离（采样点）内保持初始增益
窗口大小，以采样点数为单位

English: Fraction of local average to subtract
Chinese: 减去的局部平均值的比例
可选的局部增益/偏移区域

English: Time constant to use for StartupRevs
Chinese: 启动时使用的时间常数

English: Rate of decay to use for StartupRevs
Chinese: 启动时使用的衰减速率

English: Number of revs to use TimeConstantStartup
Chinese: 启动时使用的时间常数的圈数
目标方位角维度的倍数

English: elta to add to shadow area size
Chinese: 增加到阴影区域大小的增量

English: Name of file to initialise from
Chinese: 初始化所用文件的名称

English: Use loaded file as a lower limit
Chinese: 使用加载的文件作为底限
填充视频的开始方位角度
填充视频的结束方位角度

English: Minimum hits needed in full window
Chinese: 全窗口所需的最小命中数
最近窗口的最小命中数

English: Integrate if video is greater than this
Chinese: 如果视频大于此值则集成

English: Output 255 if video is greater than this
Chinese: 如果视频大于此值则输出255

English: Value to output if video is above instant threshold
Chinese: 如果视频高于即时门限，则输出的值
目标在距离上的最小位置
最小目标采样值（跨度起始）

English: Min target sample value at start of span
Chinese: 跨度开始时的最小目标采样值
最小目标采样值（跨度结束）

English: Min target sample value at end of span
Chinese: 跨度结束时的最小目标采样值
目标跨度的最小采样数

English: Minimum blob size in azimuth in degrees
Chinese: 方位角度内的最小blob大小

English: Maximum blob size in azimuth in degrees
Chinese: 方位角度内的最大blob大小

English: Minimum blob size in azimuth in metres
Maximum blob size in azimuth in metres
Preserve video or blank below threshold
Chinese: 保留视频或在阈值以下清空

English: Inland range from coastline to inhibit blobs
Chinese: 从海岸线到内陆的距离以抑制blobs

English: Seaward range from coastline to inhibit blobs
Chinese: 从海岸线到海向的距离以抑制blobs

English: Limit on number of small plots per sector
Chinese: 每个扇区小点迹的数量限制（如果非零）
小点迹的权重限制（如果非零）
允许不符合条件的点迹
允许不符合条件的点迹
在数据库中保持原始点迹

English: Min azimuth extent of merged plots in degrees
Chinese: 融合点迹的最小方位角度

English: Max azimuth extent of merged plots in degrees
Chinese: 融合点迹的最大方位角度

English: Min azimuth extent of merged plots in metres
